title: Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz met with the University Students

Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz met with the University Students

22.03.2022

In its first event, the "Board of Trustees - Student Meetings" program hosted Chairman of the Board of Trustees Prof. İrfan Gündüz.

The program of "Board of Trustees - Student Meetings" started hosting Chairman of the Board of Trustees, Prof. İrfan Gündüz.

The program, organized by the Department of Art, Culture and Sports, was held on Monday, March 14 at the Student Center with intense participation. At the program, Prof. İrfan Gündüz briefly talked about his education and academic life and gave advice to the students. Stating that he also teaches vocational courses at Aksaray Imam Hatip High School, Professor Gündüz said, "If I were born again, I would like to teach again." He emphasized that the teaching profession is very valuable to him.

The program, in which Gündüz's political life and abroad experience were also discussed, took place in a warm atmosphere of conversation under the moderation of Abdülkerim Pirim, Chairman of the Board of Student Representatives of Ibn Haldun University. Professor İrfan Gündüz answered various questions of the students during the program.

The "Board of Trustees - Student Meetings", which is organized to bring together the members of the Board of Trustees with the students of the university, will continue with the participation of a different member of the Board of Trustees every month.
